title: Zap's Compat (Bean's Backpacks)
description: A small addon to Bean's Backpacks adding additional compat for a few mods.
body:
![Hey look! It's the logo!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/735890913b4116c12611acf4931a333feb8a8d9f.png)
# Bean's Backpacks

This mod is part of a series of mods dedicated to providing compatibility to other mods. This mod in particular centers around adding compatibility to **Bean's Backpacks (Legacy)**, a mod that adds backpacks.

## Features!
Obviously requires [**Bean's Backpacks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/beans-backpacks).

This mod adds compatibility between **Bean's Backpacks (Legacy)** and the following mods:

- **Caverns and Chasms**: new backpacks for Silver and Necromium materials, plus compatibility with the Exile armor trim and the additional trim materials.
- **Oreganized**: new backpack for the Electrum material, plus compatibility with the additional trim materials.
- **Atmospheric**, **Neapolitan**, **Jaden's Nether Expansion**: compatibility with the new armor trims.
- **Upgrade Aquatic**, **Rubinated Nether**: compatibility with additional trim materials.

## Feedback!
Join the official **SyndicateMC** Discord server [here](https://discord.gg/xM59TVyKYQ) to report bugs, suggest more mods to provide compatibility, and just chat! 

If you need to report bugs for the base **Bean's Backpacks (Legacy)** mod report them [here](https://github.com/BeansGalaxy/Beans-Backpacks-2/issues).
